name: Kouloures (Easter Bread)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften yeast in warm water and set aside.
2. Combine boiling water and cinnamon; set aside.
3. Combine sugar and eggs; beat well.
4. Add melted butter to egg mixture and beat again.
5. Skim off 1/4 cup of clear cinnamon water and add along with yeast, milk, and baking powder to the egg mixture, blending well.
6. Combine dry ingredients (flour, salt) and add to batter; knead dough until smooth and elastic, about 10 minutes.
7. Shape dough into two greased 8-inch round pans. Crisscross 2 strips of dough over each loaf.
8. Cover and let rise in a warm place until doubled in bulk.
9. Brush loaves with beaten egg yolk and sprinkle with sesame seeds.
10. Bake at 350 degrees for 25 minutes or until brown.
11. Push dyed eggs into bread immediately when the loaves are removed from the oven.
